Introduce

tale: Long long ago there was a boy named David, he is a clever, calm but coward (3C) shepherd boy.He has been leading a steady life.

March 05, 2017

Pagination Post

Here we see Tale’s pagination feature in action. It is set to 5 posts per page by default. Feel free to change this number in the _config.yml file!
